title: Long Reach Cobweb Brush Dust Cleaner | Extendable Feather Duster with Telescopic Pole from 115cm to 180cm | Angled Head Cobweb Duster for Ceiling and Indoor Corner Cleaning
features: Angled Cobweb Extendable Duster – With a telescopic handle that can extend from 115cm to 180cm, there is no need to struggle to reach the tops and corners of your home using this long feather duster. Simply extend to the height needed!

Swivel Action Head − Giving multiple positions for all-around cleaning! This also makes the dusting brush perfect for another number of cleaning jobs such as dusting on top of shelves and cupboards. Simply twist and loosen the nut, move to the desired angle and tighten back up.

Strong and Sturdy Metal Handle – The extendable cleaning pole of this duster brush has an easy twist and lock system. It also makes this telescopic duster nice and compact for storing when not in use.

Angled Brush Head − Ideal for getting into corners, the head of this long duster features soft to medium bristles that won't damage walls or furnishings. They can also be washed and cleaned under a tap if needed for extra-long life.
Trusted Brand – The angled head cobweb brush is a quality assured product of The Dustpan and Brush Store. We know what you want from extendable dusters for cleaning and aim to deliver exactly that!
description: The Long Reach Cobweb Brush with angled head can extend from 115cm to 180cm which is great for cleaning hard-to-reach corners and edges of ceilings. The telescopic long handled duster is one of the best on the market and offers both height and control. Ideal for cleaning cobwebs and hard-to-reach dusty corners and edges, this long feather duster extendable is the best dust remover for high ceiling fans, high window sills, ceiling corners and bookshelves.
